title: draba aizoides subsp. aizoides
intro: Draba aizoides subsp. aizoides is a subspecies of the Draba aizoides plant, a flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. It is also known as Aizoon or Rock Cress. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, and is said to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies.
